_comment: Template for the agy (Antigravity CLI) plugin hooks manifest. agy does NOT expand ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} (verified live, agy 1.0.15), so minni-install/propagate.py stamps __MINNI_GEMINI_DIST__ with the absolute dist path of the gemini extension install before registering the plugin via `agy plugin install`. Entries are matcher-free on purpose: agy's hooks.json loader drops entries that carry a matcher (loads them as '0 total handlers'); the recall guard re-checks tool scope in code instead. agy 1.0.15 only dispatches PreToolUse, PostToolUse and Stop; SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreCompact are declared so they light up without a reinstall once agy adds them.
